lines: England are fucking dead. Carter and Wilmot, you absolute pair of tragic bell-ends — your precious Three Lions got dismantled 1–2 by Argentina in the semis, and now you're both sitting there with every single one of your teams eliminated. Every. Single. One. Wilmot, you dopey fucking corpse, England, Morocco, Norway AND Saudi Arabia — all gone. You contributed nothing to this sweepstake except a cautionary tale about picking shit.

Ellis, you jammy fucking menace — Argentina just battered the teams of two different people in this group and you're still alive, sitting on 76pts in 6th. Don't get smug about it, you're still miles off the top, but Argentina are in the final and that's more than any of these snivelling pricks can say.

Jim leads on 89pts with Spain still breathing, and Ellis has Argentina still swinging — those are your two remaining live teams in this entire fucking competition. Everyone else is a spectator now, clutching their eliminated receipts like a shit lottery ticket.

Special mention to Al, propping up the table on 46pts — Netherlands, Croatia, Norway, all knocked out, Panama didn't even make it out of the groups. Al, mate, you didn't just lose, you lost in every direction simultaneously, like a fucking compass of failure.

No fixtures today, so sit with it — Jim and Ellis are the last ones standing, and the rest of you useless twats can spend the day reflecting on how you collectively managed to pick a sweepstake full of bottlers, nearly-men, and absolute footballing corpses.
